response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, aligning well with the primary stack. Her work includes AI-agent infrastructure, scalability projects (handling millions of requests), and cross-language proficiency (TypeScript, Dlang, Java, Kotlin). However, her recent role (Staff Software Engineer) may imply potential overqualification, and her lack of explicit Kubernetes experience in recent roles could be a minor gap.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Proven track record in scalable systems (e.g., handling millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong AI-agent development experience (MCP, Model Context Protocol)
concerns: Recent role as Staff Engineer may indicate potential overqualification for a mid-senior role
Limited explicit mention of Kubernetes in recent roles (despite Docker experience)
Minor gap in primary stack (Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in recent roles)
